pi_items.source: setup_task.sh and export_result.sh use this exact filename

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a synthetically generated empty building shell ('dmv_starter.sh3d'), which is created dynamically at setup time by parsing an official Sweet Home 3D gallery sample ('SweetHome3DExample7.sh3d') and systematically stripping all furniture elements. The scoring logic in verifier.py correctly aligns with the metadata claims, explicitly enforcing a maximum possible score of 100 points and a passing threshold of 70 points. The required occupation of 'Facility Planner' and industry of 'Government / Civic Architecture' match the explicitly defined expectations in the task description and verifier documentation.
